affliction.description: A master of shadow magic who specializes in drains and damage-over-time spells. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Hellcaller
left.description: Amongst the satyr sects throughout Azeroth, Hellcallers are the most feared. Hellcaller warlocks have learned to weave together the vilest of shadow magic and entropic fel fire at the cost of corrupting their own soul.

right.name: Soul Harvester
right.description: Few grasp the power hidden within souls, but many know the hunger demons share for spirits of the fallen. Soul Harvesters enter pacts with demons from the Twisting Nether, serving as their host and feeding them the souls of their foes in exchange for incredible power.

choices.name: Nightmare
choices.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

choices.name: Horrify
choices.description: Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

nodes.name: Demonic Resilience
nodes.description: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

nodes.name: Swift Artifice
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

nodes.name: Demonic Fortitude
nodes.description: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

nodes.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
nodes.description: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

nodes.name: Fel Synergy
nodes.description: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

nodes.name: Pact of Gluttony
nodes.description:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health. 60 seconds cooldown.

nodes.name: Demonic Embrace
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Fel Domination
nodes.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

nodes.name: Fel Pact
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Soul Leech
nodes.description: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 seconds, up to 5% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Dark Pact
nodes.description: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional 30000 for 20 seconds. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

choices.name: Ichor of Devils
choices.description: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

choices.name: Frequent Donor
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
nodes.description:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 seconds.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 seconds.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 seconds.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 seconds and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

nodes.name: Oppressive Darkness
nodes.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 seconds and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 seconds and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

nodes.name: Mortal Coil
nodes.description: Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 seconds and healing you for 20% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Banish
nodes.description: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration, or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 seconds. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

choices.name: Howl of Terror
choices.description: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 seconds. Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Shadowfury
choices.description: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Fiendish Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Burning Rush
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 seconds. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts 1 second.

nodes.name: Fel Armor
nodes.description:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 seconds.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

nodes.name: Demon Skin
nodes.description:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.1% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

nodes.name: Abyss Walker
nodes.description: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Demonic Gateway
nodes.description: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 seconds.

choices.name: Strength of Will
choices.description: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

choices.name: Dark Accord
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 seconds.

nodes.name: Soulburn
nodes.description:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 seconds.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 seconds. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 seconds.

nodes.name: Demonic Circle
nodes.description:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 minutes. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects.

You also learn:

Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

nodes.name: Foul Mouth
nodes.description: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

nodes.name: Frequent Traveler
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 second and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

nodes.name: Soul Link
nodes.description:
5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead.

While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Pact of the Eredar
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.name: Infernal Beneficiary
nodes.description: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Improved Mortal Coil
nodes.description: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Curse of Tongues
nodes.description:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 60 seconds.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

nodes.name: Curse of Exhaustion
nodes.description:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 seconds.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

choices.name: Blight of Weakness
choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 seconds.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

choices.name: Blight of Tongues
choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 seconds.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

nodes.name: Pact of the Annihilan
nodes.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

nodes.name: Pact of the Satyr
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Pact of the Nathrezim
nodes.description: Increases your Leech by 2%.

nodes.name: Fortified Soul
nodes.description: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Empowered Healthstone
nodes.description: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

nodes.name: Empowered Drain Life
nodes.description: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

nodes.name: Nether Plating
nodes.description:
Adorns your Darkglare with armor forged from within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%.

Eye Beam now jumps to up to 4 additional targets within 10 yards and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Haunt
nodes.description:
A ghostly soul haunts a single target, dealing 86473 Shadow damage and increasing your damage dealt to the target by 12% for 18 seconds.

If the target dies, Haunt's cooldown is reset.

nodes.name: Death's Embrace
nodes.description: Agony, Corruption, Unstable Affliction, Seed of Corruption, and Shadow Bolt deal up to 40% increased damage on targets below 35% health. Damage increase is higher against lower health targets.

nodes.name: Summon Darkglare
nodes.description:
Summons a Darkglare from the Twisting Nether that increases the damage of your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 20% while active.

The Darkglare will serve you for 20 seconds, blasting its target for 58445 Shadow damage, increased by 10% for every damage over time effect you have active on their current target.

choices.name: Summoner's Embrace
choices.description: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by 3%.

choices.name: Grimoire of Sacrifice
choices.description:
Sacrifices your demon pet for power, gaining its command demon ability, and causing your spells to sometimes also deal 4462 additional Shadow damage.

Lasts 1 second or until you summon a demon pet.

nodes.name: Contagion
nodes.description: Increases critical strike damage dealt by Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 15%.

choices.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
choices.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 15% and increases its damage by 40%.

choices.name: Drain Soul
choices.description:
Replaces Shadow Bolt.

Drains the target's soul, causing 66825 Shadow damage over 5 seconds.

Damage is increased by 100% against enemies below 20% health.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies during this effect.

nodes.name: Malediction
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 5%.

nodes.name: Nightfall
nodes.description:
Corruption damage has a chance to cause your next Shadow Bolt or Malefic Grasp to deal 25% increased damage.

Shadow Bolt is instant cast and Malefic Grasp channels 50% faster when affected.

nodes.name: Agony
nodes.description:
Inflicts increasing agony on the target, causing up to 60958 Shadow damage over 18 seconds. Damage starts low and increases over the duration. Refreshing Agony maintains its current damage level.

Agony damage sometimes generates 1 Soul Shard.

nodes.name: Seed of Corruption
nodes.description:
Embeds a demon seed in the enemy target that will explode after 12 seconds, dealing 25800 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards and applying Corruption to them. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

The seed will detonate early if the target is hit by other detonations, or takes 6000 damage from your spells.

choices.name: Absolute Corruption
choices.description:
Corruption is now permanent and deals 15% increased damage.

Duration reduced to 24 second against players.

choices.name: Siphon Life
choices.description: Corruption deals 30% increased damage and its periodic damage heals you for 5% of the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Cunning Cruelty
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul have a chance to trigger a Shadow Bolt Volley, dealing 14969 Shadow damage to 5 enemies within 10 yards of your current target.

nodes.name: Withering Bolt
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul deal 5% increased damage, up to 15%, per damage over time effect you have active on the target.

nodes.name: Creeping Death
nodes.description: Your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction deal damage 10% faster.

nodes.name: Improved Haunt
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Haunt by 35% and reduces its cast time by 0.3 second.

nodes.name: Ravenous Afflictions
nodes.description: Critical strikes from your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction have a chance to grant Nightfall.

nodes.name: Sudden Onset
nodes.description: Agony damage is increased by 10% and starts at 3 stacks.

nodes.name: Sacrolash's Dark Strike
nodes.description: Corruption damage is increased by 15%, and each time it deals damage any of your Curses active on the target are extended by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Nocturnal Yield
nodes.description: Increases Corruption damage by 10% and Nightfall additionally makes your next Seed of Corruption cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

nodes.name: Fatal Echoes
nodes.description: When Unstable Affliction expires, it has a 10% chance to reapply itself.

nodes.name: Patient Zero
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Seed of Corruption to its host by 50%.

nodes.name: Sow the Seeds
nodes.description: Seed of Corruption now embeds demon seeds into 2 additional nearby enemies at 50% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Cascading Calamity
nodes.description: Casting Unstable Affliction on a target affected by your Unstable Affliction increases your Haste by 5% for 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Shard Instability
nodes.description: Damage dealt by Shadow Bolt has a 20% chance to make your next Unstable Affliction cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

nodes.name: Malefic Grasp
nodes.description:
While Darkglare is active, your Shadow Bolt becomes Malefic Grasp.

Malefic Grasp
Binds the target in twilight, dealing 126359 Shadow damage over 4 seconds.

When Malefic Grasp deals damage, it causes all of your other periodic Affliction damage effects to instantly deal 30% of their normal periodic damage.

nodes.name: Cull the Weak
nodes.description: Casting Unstable Affliction or Seed of Corruption reduces the cooldown of Dark Harvest by 1.5 seconds.

nodes.name: Dark Harvest
nodes.description:
Consume the life force of each target afflicted by your damaging periodic effects, dealing 402985 Shadowflame damage over 3 seconds.

Damage dealt by Dark Harvest heals you for 50% of damage done.

nodes.name: Shared Agony
nodes.description: Increases Agony damage by 10% and Agony now hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

nodes.name: Unstable Affliction
nodes.description:
Afflicts the target with 30236 Shadow damage over 8 seconds. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

If dispelled, deals 390801 damage to the dispeller and silences them for 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 15% per stack on the target.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies while afflicted.

nodes.name: Niskaran Methods
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Agony and Corruption by 10%.

nodes.name: Potent Soul Shards
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Unstable Affliction and Seed of Corruption by 5%.

nodes.name: Xavius' Gambit
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Unstable Affliction by 150 seconds and increases its damage by 5%.

nodes.name: Seeds of Destruction
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Seed of Corruption by 200 seconds and increases its damage by 5%.

nodes.name: Practiced Pestilence
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Eye Contract
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Summon Darkglare by 5 seconds.

ranks.description:
Haunt now calls upon a demonic soul from within the Twisting Nether to haunt your target.

The soul is unstable and ravenous, dealing 78151 Shadow damage to its host and 3 enemies within 10 yards suffering from your Corruption over its duration.
Increases the initial damage of Haunt by 50% and Haunt increases damage dealt to its host by an additional 2%.

Damage dealt by Haunt has a chance to release the demonic soul haunting its target. When released, it unleashes a devastating attack before being banished back to Nathreza.

Wrath of Nathreza
Calls down a meteor formed from the ruins of Nathreza that explodes upon impact, dealing 202141 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Curse of the Satyr
choices.description:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 minutes.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

choices.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
choices.description: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Seeds of Their Demise
nodes.description:
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals 11956 Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 second until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.

nodes.name: Mark of Xavius
nodes.description:
Wither damage increased by 25%.

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

choices.name: Zevrim's Resilience
choices.description: Dark Pact heals you for 19749 every 1 seconds while active.

choices.name: Illhoof's Design
choices.description: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Blackened Soul
nodes.description:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 second to deal 11956 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

nodes.name: Wither
nodes.description:
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing 2380 Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional 35585 Shadowflame damage over 18 seconds.

Replaces Corruption.

nodes.name: Malevolence
nodes.description:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 seconds, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take 151861 Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

nodes.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
nodes.description:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%.

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

nodes.name: Xalan's Cruelty
nodes.description: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

nodes.name: Xalan's Ferocity
nodes.description: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

choices.name: Hatefury Rituals
choices.description: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

choices.name: Bleakheart Tactics
choices.description: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

nodes.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
nodes.description: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

nodes.name: Devil Fruit
nodes.description: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 second.

nodes.name: Through the Felvine
nodes.description:
Increases the damage of Unstable Affliction by 8% and Seed of Corruption by 4%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

nodes.name: Wicked Reaping
nodes.description:
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.

Consuming Nightfall feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal 72120 Shadow damage to your target.

choices.name: Shared Fate
choices.description:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 seconds. This effect inflicts 6078 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 1 second.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Feast of Souls
choices.description: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

choices.name: Eternal Servitude
choices.description: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 seconds.

choices.name: Gorefiend's Resolve
choices.description: Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

nodes.name: Necrolyte Teachings
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul damage increased by 20%. Nightfall increases the damage of Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional 50%.

nodes.name: Demoniac's Fervor
nodes.description: Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to targets affected by your Unstable Affliction.

nodes.name: Sataiel's Volition
nodes.description: Corruption deals damage 25% faster and Haunt grants Nightfall.

nodes.name: Quietus
nodes.description:
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Nightfall activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

nodes.name: Soul Anathema
nodes.description:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing 13765 Shadow damage over 10 seconds.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

choices.name: Gorebound Fortitude
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 seconds.

choices.name: Friends In Dark Places
choices.description: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

nodes.name: Demonic Soul
nodes.description:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing 42388 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Shadow of Death
nodes.description: Your Dark Harvest spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 1 Soul Shard that each contain a Succulent Soul every 1 second while channeled.

nodes.name: Eternal Hunger
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 seconds and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

nodes.name: Shared Vessel
nodes.description:
Increases your Mastery by 2%.

This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

nodes.name: Manifested Avarice
nodes.description:
Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 seconds.

Soul Swipe
Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing 23461 Shadow damage to its target and 15641 Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

demonology.description: A commander of demons who twists the souls of their army into devastating power. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Diabolist
left.description: The defeat of the Legion left many powerful demons unbound. Diabolists command greater demons once thought to be uncontrollable and wield abyssal powers from the Twisting Nether on the battlefield.

right.name: Soul Harvester
right.description: Few grasp the power hidden within souls, but many know the hunger demons share for spirits of the fallen. Soul Harvesters enter pacts with demons from the Twisting Nether, serving as their host and feeding them the souls of their foes in exchange for incredible power.

nodes.name: Hand of Gul'dan
nodes.description:
Calls down a demonic meteor full of Wild Imps which burst forth to attack the target.

Deals up to 18043 Shadowflame damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summons 3 Wild Imps.

nodes.name: Improved Demonic Tactics
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your primary demon by 50% of your critical strike chance.

choices.name: Implosion
choices.description: Demonic forces suck 6 of your Wild Imps toward the target, and then cause them to violently explode, dealing 16365 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

choices.name: Power Siphon
choices.description: Instantly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.

nodes.name: Call Dreadstalkers
nodes.description: Summons 2 ferocious Dreadstalkers to attack the target for 12 seconds.

choices.name: Mark of Shatug
choices.description:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Gloomhound and learns the following ability:

Gloom Slash
Tooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional 3813 Shadow damage.

choices.name: Mark of F'harg
choices.description:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Charhound and learns the following ability:

Infernal Presence
Cloaked in the ever-burning flames of the abyss, dealing 1918 Fire damage to enemies within 10 yards every 1 second.

nodes.name: Demonic Calling
nodes.description: Call Dreadstalkers costs 1 less Soul Shard and its cast time is reduced by 50%.

nodes.name: Summon Demonic Tyrant
nodes.description:
Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 seconds.

Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active.

nodes.name: Master Summoner
nodes.description: Increases Mastery by 3% and reduces the cast time of your Summon Demonic Tyrant and Summon Felguard by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Flametouched
nodes.description: Increases the attack speed of your Dreadstalkers by 10% and their critical strike chance by 15%.

nodes.name: Rune of Shadows
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 10% and increases its damage by 15%.

nodes.name: Summon Doomguard
nodes.description:
Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 seconds. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 seconds.

Doom Bolt Volley
Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting 49671 Shadow damage to each target.

nodes.name: Demonic Brutality
nodes.description: Damaging critical strikes dealt by you and your demons deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Imp-erator
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Wild Imp's Fel Firebolt by 15%.

nodes.name: Antoran Armaments
nodes.description:
Your Demonic Tyrant is equipped with armor forged within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. While summoned, your Demonic Tyrant now assaults enemies with powerful melee attacks.

Burning Cleave
Cleaves all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting 11520 Shadowflame damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Demoniac
nodes.description:
Grants access to the following abilities:

Demonbolt
Send the fiery soul of a fallen demon at the enemy, causing 47613 Shadowflame damage.

Generates 2 Soul Shards.

Demonic Core
When your Wild Imps fade or are imploded, you have a 10% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core.

When your summoned Dreadstalkers fade away, you have a 100% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core.

Demonic Core reduces the cast time of Demonbolt by 100%. Maximum 4 stacks.

nodes.name: Blighted Maw
nodes.description: The fangs of your Dreadstalkers are coated in corrosive bile, causing Dreadbite to deal additional damage equal to 50% of damage dealt as Plague damage.

nodes.name: Demonic Knowledge
nodes.description: Hand of Gul'dan has a 8% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.

nodes.name: Fel Intellect
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 2%.

nodes.name: Practiced Rituals
nodes.description: Increases your Mastery by 2%.

nodes.name: Summon Vilefiend
nodes.description: Call Dreadstalkers also summons a Vilefiend that assists you in combat for 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Imp Gang Boss
nodes.description: Hand of Gul'dan now empowers 1 of the Wild Imps it summons, increasing its damage dealt by 100%.

nodes.name: Summon Felguard
nodes.description: Summons a Felguard under your command as a powerful melee combatant.

nodes.name: Infernal Rapidity
nodes.description: When your Wild Imps cast Fel Firebolt, they have 10% chance to instantly cast another Fel Firebolt at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Fel Armaments
nodes.description: The cooldown of your Felguard's Felstorm is reduced by 10 seconds and damage dealt to your primary demon is reduced by 10%.

nodes.name: Tyrant's Oblation
nodes.description: Your Demonic Tyrant also empowers you while active, increasing your haste by 8%.

nodes.name: Empowered Felstorm
nodes.description: Increases the damage of your Felguard's Felstorm by 20% and its duration by 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Spiteful Reconstitution
nodes.description: Increases Demonbolt damage by 10% and consuming a Demonic Core has a chance to summon a Wild Imp.

nodes.name: Inner Demons
nodes.description: You passively summon a Wild Imp to fight for you every 12 second.

nodes.name: Dominant Hand
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan to its main target by 20%.

nodes.name: Stabilized Portals
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Summon Vilefiend, Grimoire: Imp Lord, and Grimoire: Fel Ravager by 3 seconds.

choices.name: Grimoire: Imp Lord
choices.description:
Summons an Imp Lord to assist you in combat for 20 seconds and will remove 1 harmful effect from you when summoned.

Transforms into Singe Magic while on cooldown.

choices.name: Grimoire: Fel Ravager
choices.description:
Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 seconds and will purge 1 beneficial magic effect from an enemy.

Turns into Devour Magic while on cooldown.

nodes.name: Hellbent Commander
nodes.description: Your demons deal 1% increased damage for each demon you control.

nodes.name: To Hell and Back
nodes.description:
Power Siphon and Implosion summon 1 Imp Gang Boss for every 2 Wild Imps sacrificed. Wild Imps summoned this way gain Unstable Soul.

Unstable Soul
Increases damage done by 50% and Fel Firebolt now jumps to 4 additional targets.

nodes.name: Doom
nodes.description:
When Demonbolt consumes a Demonic Core it inflicts impending doom upon the target, dealing 48374 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds of its target after 20 seconds or when removed. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hand of Gul'dan reduces the duration of Doom by 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Reign of Tyranny
nodes.description: Your Demonic Tyrant lasts an additional 5 seconds and extends the duration of your Dreadstalkers by 15 seconds when summoned.

ranks.description: Summoning your Demonic Tyrant leaves open a portal to Argus for 15 seconds, causing every 2 casts of Hand of Gul'dan to summon a subjugated demon that serves you for 10 seconds.
Increases the duration of Dominion of Argus by 5 seconds and increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan by 10%.

While Dominion of Argus is active, Hand of Gul'dan refunds 1 Soul Shard.

Demons summoned by Dominion of Argus last an additional 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Secrets of the Coven
nodes.description:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Shadow Bolt to become Infernal Bolt.

Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing 161682 Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

nodes.description:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Hand of Gul'dan to become Ruination.

Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing 304549 Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps.

Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Abyssal Dominion
nodes.description: Summon Demonic Tyrant is empowered, dealing 70% increased damage and increasing the damage of your demons by 20% while active.

nodes.name: Flames of Xoroth
nodes.description: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

choices.name: Soul-Etched Circles
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 seconds.

choices.name: Annihilan's Bellow
choices.description: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds and range is increased by 5 yds.

nodes.name: Gloom of Nathreza
nodes.description: Hand of Gul'dan deals 15% increased damage for each Soul Shard spent.

nodes.name: Diabolic Ritual

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Hand of Gul'dan to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

nodes.name: Touch of Rancora
nodes.description: Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Hand of Gul'dan by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

nodes.description:

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing 28154 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.description: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 seconds and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

destruction.description: A master of chaos who calls down fire to burn and demolish enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

right.description: Amongst the satyr sects throughout Azeroth, Hellcallers are the most feared. Hellcaller warlocks have learned to weave together the vilest of shadow magic and entropic fel fire at the cost of corrupting their own soul.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 seconds.

nodes.description:
When your Immolate deals periodic damage to a target above 80% health, gain 2% Haste for 10 seconds.

Stacks up to 3 times.

nodes.description:
Blasts a target for 59616 Shadowflame damage. Only usable on enemies that have less than 20% health.

Restores 1 Soul Shard and refunds a charge if the target dies within 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Chaotic Inferno
nodes.description: Increases Chaos Bolt damage by 5% and Chaos Bolt now has a 25% chance to make your next Incinerate instant.

nodes.name: Emberstorm
nodes.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 2% and reduces the cast time of your Incinerate spell by 20%.

choices.name: Demonfire Infusion
choices.description:
Periodic damage from Immolate has a 4% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

Incinerate has a 25% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

choices.name: Channel Demonfire
choices.description: Launches 15 bolts of felfire over 3 seconds at random targets afflicted by your Immolate within 40 yds. Each bolt deals 4722 Fire damage to the target and 2347 Fire damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Roaring Blaze
nodes.description:
Increases Conflagrate damage by 10%.

Conflagrate now erupts the target's Immolate, spreading it up to 3 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Ruin
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike damage of your Destruction spells by 15%.

nodes.name: Backdraft
nodes.description: Conflagrate reduces the cast time of your next Incinerate, Chaos Bolt, or Soul Fire by 30%. Maximum 2 charges.

nodes.name: Conflagrate
nodes.description:
Triggers an explosion on the target, dealing 43117 Fire damage.

Generates 5 Soul Shard Fragments.

choices.name: Rain of Fire
choices.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire the target location, dealing 44080 Fire damage over 8 seconds to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

choices.name: Rain of Fire
choices.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire upon your target, dealing 44080 Fire damage over 8 seconds to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at your target.

nodes.name: Improved Chaos Bolt
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 10% and reduces its cast time by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Raging Demonfire
nodes.description: Channel Demonfire fires an additional 2 bolts. Each bolt increases the remaining duration of Immolate on all targets hit by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Fiendish Cruelty
nodes.description: Critical strikes dealt by Chaos Bolt, Conflagrate, or Incinerate have a 10% chance to make your next cast of Shadowburn within 30 seconds cost no Soul Shards and usable on any target regardless of health.

nodes.name: Alythess's Ire
nodes.description: Rain of Fire has a 20% chance to reduce the cost of your next Rain of Fire within 8 seconds by 100%.

nodes.name: Lake of Fire
nodes.description:
Cataclysm now leaves behind a lake of fire that deals 72000 Fire damage to enemies within it over 10 seconds.

Immolate deals 20% increased damage to enemies within the lake of fire.

nodes.name: Practiced Chaos
nodes.description: Increases Mastery by 2%.

nodes.name: Improved Conflagrate
nodes.description: Conflagrate gains an additional charge.

choices.name: Dimensional Rift
choices.description:
Chaos Bolt and Shadowburn have a 10% chance to rip open a hole in space and time, opening a random portal that damages your target:

Shadowy Tear
Deals 88609 Shadow damage over 14 seconds.

Unstable Tear
Deals 75951 Chaos damage over 6 seconds.

Chaos Tear
Fires a Chaos Bolt, dealing 39180 Chaos damage. This Chaos Bolt always critically strikes and your critical strike chance increases its damage.

Generates 10 Soul Shard Fragments.

choices.name: Soul Fire
choices.description:
Burns the enemy's soul, dealing 320060 Fire damage and applying Immolate.

Generates 1 Soul Shard.

nodes.name: Avatar of Destruction
nodes.description:
Casting Soul Fire summons an Overfiend.

Opening a Dimensional Rift has a chance to summon an Overfiend instead.

Summon Overfiend
Generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 second and casts Chaos Bolt at 80% effectiveness at its summoner's target. Lasts 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Devastation
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Destruction spells by 3%.

nodes.name: Chaos Bolt
nodes.description: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, dealing a critical strike for 98068 Chaos damage. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance.

ranks.description:
Casting Incinerate has a chance to evoke an echo of the Dark Titan's power.

Echo of Sargeras
Hurl an ember torn from Nihilam at the target, dealing 22500 Shadowflame damage and an additional 19500 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Memories of the Titans' destruction flash in your mind when you evoke the Dark Titan's power, increasing critical strike by 4% and haste by 4% for 6 seconds.

Casting Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, or Rain of Fire evokes an echo of the Dark Titan's power at 50%, 50%, or 60% effectiveness respectively.

If no target is found, a random target suffering from your Immolate will be selected.

nodes.name: Secrets of the Coven
nodes.description:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt.

Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing 161682 Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

nodes.name: Ruination
nodes.description:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination.

Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing 304549 Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 1 Diabolic Imp.

Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance and is reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Abyssal Dominion
nodes.description: Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Flames of Xoroth
nodes.description: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

choices.name: Soul-Etched Circles
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 seconds.

choices.name: Annihilan's Bellow
choices.description: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds and range is increased by 5 yds.

nodes.name: Gloom of Nathreza
nodes.description: Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells.

choices.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
choices.description: Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 seconds.

choices.name: Infernal Machine
choices.description: Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

nodes.name: Cloven Souls
nodes.description: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5% for 15 seconds.

choices.name: Infernal Vitality
choices.description: Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 seconds.

choices.name: Infernal Bulwark
choices.description: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Diabolic Ritual
nodes.description:
Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 seconds. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 seconds instead.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

nodes.name: Touch of Rancora
nodes.description:
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

nodes.name: Mind's Eyes
nodes.description: Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Looks That Kill
nodes.description:
Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 second while active.

Diabolic Gaze
Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing 9600 Chaos damage.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

nodes.name: Diabolic Oculi
nodes.description:
You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells.

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing 28154 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Curse of the Satyr
choices.description:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 minutes.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

choices.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
choices.description: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Seeds of Their Demise
nodes.description:
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals 11956 Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 second until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain 2 stacks of Flashpoint.

nodes.name: Mark of Xavius
nodes.description:
Wither damage increased by 25%.

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

choices.name: Zevrim's Resilience
choices.description: Dark Pact heals you for 19749 every 1 seconds while active.

choices.name: Illhoof's Design
choices.description: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Blackened Soul
nodes.description:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 second to deal 11956 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

nodes.name: Wither
nodes.description:
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing 2380 Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional 35585 Shadowflame damage over 18 seconds.

Periodic damage generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment and has a 50% chance to generate an additional 1 on critical strikes.

Replaces Immolate.

nodes.name: Malevolence
nodes.description:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 seconds, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take 151861 Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

nodes.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
nodes.description:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%.

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

nodes.name: Xalan's Cruelty
nodes.description: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

nodes.name: Xalan's Ferocity
nodes.description: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

choices.name: Hatefury Rituals
choices.description: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

choices.name: Bleakheart Tactics
choices.description: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

nodes.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
nodes.description: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

nodes.name: Devil Fruit
nodes.description: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 second.

nodes.name: Through the Felvine
nodes.description:
Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 35% and Rain of Fire by 6%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.
